ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the passenger */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the passenger */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger (Male, Female) */,
  "embarked_port_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the embarkation port */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger class */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "sib_spouse_count" INTEGER /* Number of siblings or spouses aboard */,
  "parent_child_count" INTEGER /* Number of parents or children aboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address for contact */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number for international travel */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loyalty program the passenger belongs to */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Current loyalty points */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any known medical conditions */,
  "dietary_preferences" TEXT /* Any dietary preferences or restrictions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("embarked_port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the port is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the port */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the port */,
  "terminal_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the terminal in terms of number of passengers or ships */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities provided in the class (e.g., private bathroom, balcony) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel history entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the trip */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship used for the trip */,
  "cruise_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cruise line operating the trip */,
  "booking_reference" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the booking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_history_cruise_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_line_id") REFERENCES cruise_lines ("cruise_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_history_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_history_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_history_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "trip_name" TEXT /* Name of the trip */,
  "start_port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the departure port */,
  "end_port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrival port */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in days */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trip */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship used for the trip */,
  "cruise_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cruise line operating the trip */,
  "price" REAL /* Base price of the trip */,
  "discount" REAL /* Any discounts applied to the trip */,
  "available_seats" INTEGER /* Number of available seats for the trip */,
  "booking_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for booking the trip */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* Details of the cancellation policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_cruise_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_line_id") REFERENCES cruise_lines ("cruise_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cruise_lines" (
  "cruise_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cruise line */,
  "cruise_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the cruise line */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the cruise line */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the cruise line */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the cruise line */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the cruise line was founded */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of ships in the fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cruise_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ships" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "cruise_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cruise line operating the ship */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger capacity of the ship */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ship */,
  "launch_year" INTEGER /* Year the ship was launched */,
  "renovation_year" INTEGER /* Year the ship was last renovated */,
  "home_port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home port of the ship */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the ship based on passenger reviews */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ships_cruise_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_line_id") REFERENCES cruise_lines ("cruise_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ships_home_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer service, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed during access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_multiplier" REAL /* Multiplier for earning points */,
  "join_fee" REAL /* Fee for joining the loyalty program */,
  "membership_tiers" TEXT /* Tiers within the loyalty program (e.g., gold, platinum) */,
  "tier_requirements" TEXT /* Points or other requirements for each tier */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* List of benefits for each tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_loyalty" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty status entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status in the loyalty program (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned */,
  "points_redeemed" INTEGER /* Total points redeemed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_loyalty_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("program_id")
)
